sourcesContent:
import { useState } from 'react' import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext' // Expanded mock data (15 articles for a richer feed) const mockArticles = [ { id: 1, headline: "Global Markets Rally as Economic Indicators Show Strong Growth", subtitle: "Investors celebrate as major indices reach new heights", category: "Economics", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611974789855-9c2a0a7236a3?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "wide" }, { id: 2, headline: "Championship Final Set for Next Weekend", subtitle: "Top teams prepare for the ultimate showdown", category: "Sports", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574629810360-7efbbe195018?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "tall" }, { id: 3, headline: "New Film Breaks Box Office Records", subtitle: "Audiences flock to theaters for latest blockbuster", category: "Entertainment", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1489599849927-2ee91cede3ba?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "square" }, { id: 4, headline: "International Summit Addresses Climate Change", subtitle: "World leaders commit to ambitious new targets", category: "International", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611273426858-450d8e3c9fce?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "regular" }, { id: 5, headline: "Tech Innovation Transforms Healthcare Industry", subtitle: "AI-powered solutions revolutionize patient care", category: "Technology", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559757148-5c350d0d3c56?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "square" }, { id: 6, headline: "Cultural Festival Celebrates Local Heritage", subtitle: "Community comes together for annual celebration", category: "Culture", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514525253161-7a46d19cd819?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "large" }, { id: 7, headline: "Scientists Discover New Species in Deep Ocean", subtitle: "Marine biologists excited about groundbreaking find", category: "Science", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559827260-dc66d52bef19?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "tall" }, { id: 8, headline: "Local Restaurant Wins Prestigious Award", subtitle: "Chef's innovative cuisine earns international recognition", category: "Lifestyle", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "regular" }, { id: 9, headline: "Major Infrastructure Project Breaks Ground", subtitle: "City officials celebrate new transportation hub", category: "Local", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504307651254-35680f356dfd?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "square" }, { id: 10, headline: "Record-Setting Heatwave Sweeps Across Europe", subtitle: "Meteorologists warn of long-term warming trends", category: "International", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1501594907352-04cda38ebc29?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "wide" }, { id: 11, headline: "Artists Gather for Annual Creative Expo", subtitle: "Workshops, galleries, and performances fill the city", category: "Culture", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497032628192-86f99bcd76bc?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "square" }, { id: 12, headline: "AI Assistants Now Handle 40% of Customer Service", subtitle: "Businesses shift toward automated support solutions", category: "Technology", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1677442136019-21780ecad995?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "regular" }, { id: 13, headline: "Researchers Explore Potential Life on Europa", subtitle: "Icy moon of Jupiter continues to fascinate astronomers", category: "Science", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500530855697-b586d89ba3ee?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "tall" }, { id: 14, headline: "New Study Shows Benefits of Urban Green Spaces", subtitle: "Parks and community gardens linked to wellbeing", category: "Lifestyle", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1501870190083-6f9a36bafb9d?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", size: "wide" } ] const categoryColors = { Sports: "bg-red-100 text-red-700", International: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700", Economics: "bg-green-100 text-green-700", Entertainment: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700", Technology: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700", Science: "bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700", Culture: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700", Lifestyle: "bg-pink-100 text-pink-700", Local: "bg-teal-100 text-teal-700" } const sizeStyles = { wide: "aspect-[21/9]", large: "aspect-[16/9]", regular: "aspect-[4/3]", tall: "aspect-[3/4]", square: "aspect-square" } export default function NewsstandPage() { const { user } = useAuth() const [articles] = useState(mockArticles) const getUserName = () => { if (user?.email) { const name = user.email.split('@')[0] return name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + name.slice(1) } return "vivek" } return (
{/* Welcome Section */}

welcome back {getUserName()},

let’s catch you up on what's been going on!

{/* Masonry */}
{articles.map((article) => (
{/* IMAGE */}
{article.category}
{/* TEXT */}

{article.headline}

{article.subtitle}

))}
) }
